name: snapli-lambda
description: AWS Lambda function for processing uploaded photos

scripts.deploy:code: npm run build && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name snapli-image-processor --zip-file fileb://function.zip
scripts.invoke: aws lambda invoke --function-name snapli-image-processor --payload fileb://test-event.json --log-type Tail --query 'LogResult' --output text /dev/stderr | base64 -d && cat /dev/null
